prompt: Vertical portrait 9:16 high-resolution atlas world map for a Gloomhaven-inspired grim mercenary fantasy RPG setting. Terrain type: diverse_archipelago. Draw an entire grim fantasy world made of many irregular island chains and scattered landmasses, unevenly distributed across the page, in dark tactical RPG scenario-map cartography. The islands must vary strongly in size and shape: broad dungeon-riddled landmasses, crescent swamp islands, tiny reef specks, long broken mountain ridge islands, frozen northern fortress isles, volcanic ruin islands, dark forest islands, haunted catacomb islands, merchant port islands, demon-infested citadel rocks, and mercenary outpost chains. Include multiple climates and biomes across the archipelago: foggy coasts, rain-dark forests, snowy peaks, tundra, cursed marsh, rocky deserts, volcanic ruins, bleak highlands, deep river deltas, and monster-haunted badlands. Coastlines on every major island should be realistic and complex with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, deltas, fjords, lagoons, barrier islands, sea caves, reefs, shoals, and hidden coves. Make the island distribution asymmetrical and natural, with dense clusters in some regions and wide dangerous seas elsewhere. Large detailed dark parchment atlas, Gloomhaven-like tactical scenario icons and dungeon nodes allowed, gloomy overcast palette, no readable labels, no legible text, no logos, no modern satellite style.
